title: TiledMap
description: A parsed and validated Tiled map (`.tmj`). `TiledMap` represents the parsed Tiled source format. `TileMap` is the format-independent ExoJS runtime map used for rendering, queries, and mutation. Construction validates that tilesets cover a non-overlapping, duplicate-free range of global tile ids, and that every GID referenced by layers (tile layer cells, infinite-map chunks, and tile object `gid`s) falls within one of those ranges. Both checks throw TiledFormatError on failure.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: A parsed and validated Tiled map (`.tmj`).
`TiledMap` represents the parsed Tiled source format. `TileMap` is the format-independent ExoJS runtime map used for rendering, queries, and mutation.

Construction validates that tilesets cover a non-overlapping, duplicate-free range of global tile ids, and that every GID referenced by layers (tile layer cells, infinite-map chunks, and tile object `gid`s) falls within one of those ranges. Both checks throw TiledFormatError on failure.

members.name: new
members.signature: new(source: string, data: TiledMapData, tilesets: readonly TiledTileset[], imageTextures: ReadonlyMap<number, Texture>): TiledMap

members.name: destroy
members.description: Releases this map's reference to its parsed source. Tileset textures are Loader-owned and may be shared with other maps; this does NOT destroy them.

members.name: findTilesetForGid
members.description: Returns the tileset that owns gid, or undefined if gid is 0 (the empty-cell sentinel) or is not covered by any tileset. Flip/rotation flag bits are masked off before the range lookup, so the raw GID values found in TiledTileLayer.data/chunks and TiledObject.gid can be passed directly.

members.name: getProperty
members.description: Looks up a custom property by name.

members.name: toTileMap
members.description: Convert this parsed Tiled source model into a format-independent runtime TileMap from @codexo/exojs-tilemap. Only finite orthogonal maps with atlas tilesets are supported. A non-orthogonal or infinite map, or a collection-of-images tileset, throws TiledFormatError rather than silently producing wrong (misplaced) or empty geometry. Tile layers become renderable TileLayers, object groups become data-only ObjectLayers, and image layers become data-only ImageLayers; group layer children are flattened in document order. The returned TileMap does **not** own the tileset textures — they remain in the Loader cache. Destroying the returned map does not unload textures.

members.name: data
members.description: The validated raw map data this instance was built from.

members.name: source
members.description: Resolved URL this map was loaded from.

members.name: tileHeight
members.description: Tile grid cell height in pixels.

members.name: tilesets
members.description: Tilesets used by this map, sorted by TiledTileset.firstGid ascending.

members.name: tileWidth
members.description: Tile grid cell width in pixels.
